ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (actor1:Person {name: 'Martin Scorsese'})-[r1:ACTED_IN]->(movie1:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'}),
    p2 = (actor1)-[r2:DIRECTED]->(movie2:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'}),
    p3 = (movie1)-[r3:REVIEWED]->(reviewer:Person {name: 'Roger Ebert'})
RETURN p1, p2, p3
ground.question: What is the most significant role Martin Scorsese played in *Taxi Driver*, and how does Roger Ebert’s review of that film compare to his perspective on his directorial debut?

cypher:
MATCH (p:Person {name: 'Martin Scorsese'})-[:ACTED_IN {roles: ['Travis Bickle']}]->(m:Movie {title: 'Taxi Driver'})
WITH p, m
MATCH (e:Person {name: 'Roger Ebert'})-[:REVIEWED {summary: 'A bleak, cynical, and ultimately tragic portrait of a young, alienated man...'}]->(m)
WITH p, m, e
MATCH (e)-[r1:REVIEWED]->(m)<-[r2:DIRECTED]-(p)
RETURN p.name AS director, m.title AS movie, r1.summary AS ebertReview, r2.summary AS debutReview
